title: Lead Instructional Designer at Jamboree Education

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Jamboree Education
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jamboree Education family as a Instructional Designer in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jamboree Education:
Jamboree Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education!
